name: @45ck/prompt-language
description: A verification-first supervision runtime for existing coding agents that enforces real completion gates, persistent state, and deterministic execution.

scripts.eval:smoke: npm run build && node bin/cli.mjs install && node scripts/eval/smoke-test.mjs
scripts.eval:smoke:quick: npm run build && node bin/cli.mjs install && node scripts/eval/smoke-test.mjs --quick
scripts.eval:smoke:codex: npm run build && node scripts/eval/smoke-test.mjs --harness codex
scripts.eval:smoke:codex:quick: npm run build && node scripts/eval/smoke-test.mjs --harness codex --quick
scripts.eval:smoke:opencode: npm run build && node scripts/eval/smoke-test.mjs --harness opencode
scripts.eval:smoke:opencode:quick: npm run build && node scripts/eval/smoke-test.mjs --harness opencode --quick
scripts.eval:smoke:ollama: npm run build && node scripts/eval/smoke-test.mjs --harness ollama
scripts.eval:smoke:ollama:quick: npm run build && node scripts/eval/smoke-test.mjs --harness ollama --quick
scripts.eval:skill: npm run build && node bin/cli.mjs install && node scripts/eval/skill-eval.mjs
scripts.eval:skill:quick: npm run build && node bin/cli.mjs install && node scripts/eval/skill-eval.mjs --quick
scripts.eval:ab: npm run build && node bin/cli.mjs install && node scripts/eval/ab-eval.mjs
scripts.eval:ab:quick: npm run build && node bin/cli.mjs install && node scripts/eval/ab-eval.mjs --quick
scripts.eval:compare:v2: npm run build && node bin/cli.mjs install && node scripts/eval/comparative-eval-v2.mjs
scripts.eval:compare:v2:quick: npm run build && node bin/cli.mjs install && node scripts/eval/comparative-eval-v2.mjs --quick
scripts.eval:compare:v3: npm run build && node bin/cli.mjs install && node scripts/eval/comparative-eval-v3.mjs
scripts.eval:compare:v3:quick: npm run build && node bin/cli.mjs install && node scripts/eval/comparative-eval-v3.mjs --quick
scripts.eval:verify: npm run build && node bin/cli.mjs install && node scripts/eval/verification-eval.mjs
scripts.eval:verify:repeat: npm run build && node bin/cli.mjs install && node scripts/eval/verification-eval.mjs --repeat 3
scripts.eval:compare:v4: npm run build && node bin/cli.mjs install && node scripts/eval/comparative-eval-v4.mjs
scripts.eval:compare:v4:quick: npm run build && node bin/cli.mjs install && node scripts/eval/comparative-eval-v4.mjs --quick
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run spell && npm run docs:consistency && npm run depcruise && npm run knip && npm run build && npm run test:coverage && npm run eval:e2e && npm run audit:high
scripts.ci:nightly: npm run ci && npm run mutation
